title: acmispon procumbens
intro: Acmispon procumbens, also known as creeping lotus or creeping bird's foot clover, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acmispon procumbens include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Acmispon procumbens can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
